sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n50910" key="i)sa/ggelos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἰσ-άγγελος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n50910.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">like an angel,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ev.Luc.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">20.36</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2571.tlg001:4p.425M" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hierocl.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in CA</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4p.425M.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
